headline: AECOM Stock Plunges 29.7% in 6 Months: Should You Buy the Dip?
summary: After a 29.7% six-month drop, ACM trades far below its high though backlog hits $26B, margins expand and guidance rises-reviving the buy-the-dip debate.

raw.headline: AECOM Stock Plunges 29.7% in 6 Months: Should You Buy the Dip?
raw.summary: After a 29.7% six-month drop, ACM trades far below its high though backlog hits $26B, margins expand and guidance rises-reviving the buy-the-dip debate.

headline: 2 Mid-Cap Stocks with Promising Prospects and 1 We Turn Down
summary: Many investors pay attention to mid-cap stocks because they have established business models and expansive market opportunities. However, their paths to becoming $100 billion corporations are ripe with competition, ranging from giants with vast resources to agile upstarts eager to disrupt the status quo.
